hs4_products.name_cn: 洋葱、青葱、大蒜及其他葱属蔬菜
hs4_products.name_en: 0703 - Onions, shallots, garlic, leeks and other alliaceous vegetables; fresh or chilled
0904 - Pepper of the genus piper; dried or crushed or ground fruits of the genus capsicum or of the genus pimenta

hs4_products.name_cn: 角豆、海藻及其他食用植物产品
hs4_products.name_en: 1212 - Locust beans, seaweeds and other algae, sugar beet, sugar cane, fresh, chilled, frozen or dried, whether or not ground; fruit stones, kernels and other vegetable products (including unroasted chicory roots) used primarily for human consumption, n.e.c.
0303 - Fish; frozen, excluding fish fillets and other fish meat of heading 0304
0307 - Molluscs; whether in shell or not, live, fresh, chilled, frozen, dried, salted or in brine; smoked molluscs, whether in shell or not, whether or not cooked before or during the smoking process

hs4_products.name_cn: 其他调制或保藏水果、坚果及植物食用部分
hs4_products.name_en: 2008 - Fruit, nuts and other edible parts of plants; prepared or preserved in ways n.e.c., whether or not containing added sugar or other sweetening matter or spirit, not elsewhere specified or included
2003 - Mushrooms and truffles, prepared or preserved other than by vinegar or acetic acid

1702 - Sugars, including lactose, maltose, glucose or fructose in solid form; sugar syrups without added flavouring or colouring matter; artificial honey, whether or not mixed with natural honey; caramel
2005 - Vegetables preparations n.e.c.; prepared or preserved otherwise than by vinegar or acetic acid, not frozen, other than products of heading no. 2006
1202 - Ground-nuts; not roasted or otherwise cooked, whether or not shelled or broken
1604 - Prepared or preserved fish; caviar and caviar substitutes prepared from fish eggs
0802 - Nuts (excluding coconuts, Brazils and cashew nuts); fresh or dried, whether or not shelled or peeled
0910 - Ginger, saffron, tumeric (curcuma), thyme, bay leaves, curry and other spices

hs4_products.name_cn: 调制或保藏甲壳动物、软体动物
hs4_products.name_en: 1605 - Crustaceans, molluscs and other aquatic invertebrates, prepared or preserved

hs4_products.name_cn: 播种用种子、果实及孢子
hs4_products.name_en: 1209 - Seeds, fruit and spores; of a kind used for sowing

hs4_products.name_cn: 药用、香料及杀虫等用植物
hs4_products.name_en: 1211 - Plants and parts of plants (including seeds and fruits), of a kind used primarily in perfumery, in pharmacy or for insecticidal, fungicidal or similar purposes, fresh, chilled, frozen or dried, whether or not cut, crushed or powdered
2006 - Vegetables, fruit, nuts, fruit-peel and other parts of plants, preserved by sugar (drained, glace or crystallised)
0811 - Fruit and nuts; uncooked or cooked by steaming or boiling in water, frozen, whether or not containing added sugar or other sweetening matter
2106 - Food preparations not elsewhere specified or included
0410 - Animal products; insects and other edible products of animal origin, not elsewhere specified or included
1206 - Sunflower seeds; whether or not broken
1704 - Sugar confectionery (including white chocolate), not containing cocoa
0304 - Fish fillets and other fish meat (whether or not minced); fresh, chilled or frozen

hs4_products.name_cn: 孜然、茴香等香辛料种子
hs4_products.name_en: 0909 - Seeds of anise, badian, fennel, coriander, cumin, caraway or juniper
0409 - Honey; natural
2102 - Yeasts (active or inactive); other single-cell micro-organisms, dead (but not including vaccines of heading no. 3002); prepared baking powders

hs4_products.name_cn: 谷物制品及膨化谷物食品
hs4_products.name_en: 1904 - Prepared foods obtained by swelling or roasting cereals or cereal products (e.g. corn flakes); cereals (other than maize (corn)) in grain form or in the form of flakes or other worked grains (not flour and meal), pre-cooked or otherwise prepared, n.e.c.

hs4_products.name_cn: 调味汁、调味品及芥子粉
hs4_products.name_en: 2103 - Sauces and preparations therefor; mixed condiments and mixed seasonings, mustard flour and meal and prepared mustard
0804 - Dates, figs, pineapples, avocados, guavas, mangoes and mangosteens; fresh or dried
1207 - Oil seeds and oleaginous fruits, n.e.c. in chapter 12; whether or not broken
2001 - Vegetables, fruit, nuts and other edible parts of plants; prepared or preserved by vinegar or acetic acid
2002 - Tomatoes; prepared or preserved otherwise than by vinegar or acetic acid
